scripts.preship: pnpm build && pnpm lint && pnpm test
scripts.ship:version: sh -c 'if [ "$#" -ne 1 ]; then echo "Usage: pnpm ship:version <major|minor|patch|version>"; exit 1; fi; pnpm version "$1" --message "v%s"' --
scripts.ship: STATUS=$(git status --porcelain); echo "$STATUS"; if [ -n "$STATUS" ]; then echo "Uncommitted changes present. Commit or stash changes before shipping."; exit 1; fi; TAG=$(git tag --points-at HEAD | grep -E "^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$" | head -n 1); if [ -z "$TAG" ]; then echo "No vX.Y.Z tag points at HEAD. Run pnpm ship:version <major|minor|patch|version> first."; exit 1; fi; git push --follow-tags
